'''chonadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuzhe|yuzhe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuzhe|yuzhe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chonadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonadhithi|chonadhithi]] || [[word:chonadhiji|chonadhiji]] || [[word:chonadhishi|chonadhishi]] || [[word:chonadhiki|chonadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonadhuthuthu|chonadhuthuthu]] || [[word:chonadhujuju|chonadhujuju]] || [[word:chonadhushushu|chonadhushushu]] || [[word:chonadhukuku|chonadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonadhuthu|chonadhuthu]] || [[word:chonadhuju|chonadhuju]] || [[word:chonadhushu|chonadhushu]] || [[word:chonadhuku|chonadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonadhufthuf|chonadhufthuf]] || [[word:chonadhufjuf|chonadhufjuf]] || [[word:chonadhufshuf|chonadhufshuf]] || [[word:chonadhufkuf|chonadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonadhethe|chonadhethe]] || [[word:chonadheje|chonadheje]] || [[word:chonadheshe|chonadheshe]] || [[word:chonadheke|chonadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonadhothotho|chonadhothotho]] || [[word:chonadhojojo|chonadhojojo]] || [[word:chonadhoshosho|chonadhoshosho]] || [[word:chonadhokoko|chonadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonadhotho|chonadhotho]] || [[word:chonadhojo|chonadhojo]] || [[word:chonadhosho|chonadhosho]] || [[word:chonadhoko|chonadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonadhofthof|chonadhofthof]] || [[word:chonadhofjof|chonadhofjof]] || [[word:chonadhofshof|chonadhofshof]] || [[word:chonadhofkof|chonadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|chonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chonadhĂŠthĂŠ|chonadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chonadhĂŠjĂŠ|chonadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chonadhĂŠshĂŠ|chonadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chonadhĂŠkĂŠ|chonadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chonadhathatha|chonadhathatha]] || [[word:chonadhajaja|chonadhajaja]] || [[word:chonadhashasha|chonadhashasha]] || [[word:chonadhakaka|chonadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chonadhatha|chonadhatha]] || [[word:chonadhaja|chonadhaja]] || [[word:chonadhasha|chonadhasha]] || [[word:chonadhaka|chonadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chonadhafthaf|chonadhafthaf]] || [[word:chonadhafjaf|chonadhafjaf]] || [[word:chonadhafshaf|chonadhafshaf]] || [[word:chonadhafkaf|chonadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chonadhasha|chonadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonadhshĂ«sha|chonadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonadhrosha|chonadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonadhmusha|chonadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonadhyasha|chonadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonadhnkshĂ«sha|gochonadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonadhnkrosha|gochonadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonadhnkmusha|gochonadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonadhnkyasha|gochonadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chonanadhasha|chonanadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonanadhshĂ«sha|chonanadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonanadhrosha|chonanadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonanadhmusha|chonanadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonanadhyasha|chonanadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonanadhnkshĂ«sha|gochonanadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonanadhnkrosha|gochonanadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonanadhnkmusha|gochonanadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonanadhnkyasha|gochonanadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chenĂŠdhasha|chenĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chenĂŠdhshĂ«sha|chenĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chenĂŠdhrosha|chenĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chenĂŠdhmusha|chenĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chenĂŠdhyasha|chenĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gochenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochenĂŠdhnkrosha|gochenĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochenĂŠdhnkmusha|gochenĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochenĂŠdhnkyasha|gochenĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chonfadhasha|chonfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chonfadhshĂ«sha|chonfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chonfadhrosha|chonfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chonfadhmusha|chonfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chonfadhyasha|chonfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochonfadhnkshĂ«sha|gochonfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochonfadhnkrosha|gochonfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochonfadhnkmusha|gochonfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochonfadhnkyasha|gochonfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
